title: V.A. Nageswaran: We diminish ourselves as humans when we mistake ourselves for machines
description: The human mind is often viewed as a computer, as we have long used metaphors of technology for what our brain holds. But that’s just a projection. In falling for it, we risk remaking ourselves in the machine’s diminished image.
summary: The human mind is often viewed as a computer, as we have long used metaphors of technology for what our brain holds. But that’s just a projection. In falling for it, we risk remaking ourselves in the machine’s diminished image.
